data.abstract: We show how to merge two run-length compressed Burrows-Wheeler Transforms (RLBWTs) into a run-length compressed extended Burrows-Wheeler Transform (eBWT) in $O (r)$ space and $O ((r + L) \log (m + n))$ time, where $m$ and $n$ are the lengths of the uncompressed strings, $r$ is the number of runs in the final eBWT and $L$ is the sum of its irreducible LCP values.
data.title: Merging RLBWTs adaptively
